title: Agent Workflows
subtitle: Node-based procedural sequences bound to agents at hire time. Phase 1 ships 6 builtin workflows; visual editor coming in Phase 2.

detail.selectPrompt: Select a workflow from the list

hire.label: Workflow (optional)
hire.hint: Binds a procedural sequence to this hire. Slot binding supersedes the template default.

import.title: Import workflow JSON
import.hint: Paste a workflow JSON (name, description, nodes, connections). The imported row is saved as source=local; builtin seeds are never overwritten.
